snippet.title: The Battles : Jithendra V Lakshitha | Siri Sangabodhi |  Ahankara Nagare | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Battles : A R Jithendra V Lakshitha Mihiran | Mashup | Siri Sangabodhi Maligawedi | Ahankara Nagare  | The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAвҖҷS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka

snippet.description:
Shanudri Priyasad With Kavindu | а·„а·’а¶»а·” Mega Stars 3 | Round 2 | 2021-04-04
рқҗҮрқҗўрқҗ«рқҗ® рқҗҢрқҗ„рқҗҶрқҗҖрқҗ’рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗ¬ рқҹ‘ | а·Ға¶ұа·”а¶Ҝа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’ а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’а¶әа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Ҡ а·ға¶ёа¶ҹ а¶ҡа·Җа·’а¶іа·”  а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ҙа·…а¶§ а¶ёа¶ұа·Ҹа¶ҙа¶ә а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұ а¶Ҷа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а¶ә,

HM (а·„а·’а·ға·Ҡа¶ӯа·җа¶ұа¶ҡа·Ҡ)  SP а¶Ҫа·ҷа·ғ а·ға¶іа·„а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ҡа¶» 7766 а¶§ SMS а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ.
а¶үа¶»а·’а¶Ҝа·Ҹ а¶»а·Ҹа¶ӯа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ 7.30 а·ға·’а¶§ а¶¶а¶Ҝа·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Ҹ а¶Ӣа¶Ҝа·‘а·ға¶ұ 9.00 а¶Ҝа¶ҡа·Ҡа·Җа·Ҹ а¶”а¶¶а¶§ а¶ёа¶ұа·Ҹа¶ҙа¶ә а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶Ҫ а·„а·җа¶ҡ.

snippet.description:
#NoizeNews #SriLanka #MrsWorld

Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Reacting to my 'Green Screen Challenge' videos
snippet.description:
I have asked my audience to use the green screen footage I have provided to make a funny and creative video. In this video, I am reacting to a few of those videos and choosing 3 winners, who will be awarded cases of Red Bull cans. There were 200+ entries to this competition and I am super proud of all of you for participating in it. Doesn't matter if your video was good enough or not, I appreciate the effort every one of you has put into your videos. Raspat and keep improving!
*Special thanks to Red Bull for making this possible!

**********************
Green screen entries which I react to in this video in order:
WeBaA - https://youtu.be/Qq2sf69Vzso
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/MZQVwXRCAlA
Shimraan Mahir - https://youtu.be/NGUwOE4CfFA
JAYY - https://youtu.be/DK7UYlpCoLU
Dr. Saico - https://youtu.be/SF5gvSh_-DE
HeshanOnYoutube - https://youtu.be/cdP16jWad34
VolkaYami - https://youtu.be/eJhPK3-BPgQ
SANO - https://youtu.be/Pqq5CRM7XTM
Hirusha Ruwanka - https://youtu.be/rdggoDXU6j0
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/-q6iGhslwlU
SP Janith Ushan - https://youtu.be/a4IZAKrjuy8

а®Ҹа®ҜаҜҚ...а®Өа®ҫа®Өа®ҫа®®а®ҫа®°аҜҮ,а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҶа®іа®Іа®ӨаҜҚа®®а®ҫа®°аҜҮ ...
а®…а®ҹ а®…а®©аҜҚа®Ә а®•аҜҠа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ ,а®Һа®©аҜҚ а®…а®ЈаҜҚа®Ја®©аҜҚа®®а®ҫа®°аҜҮ...


а®№аҜҮ а®Ёа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•а®ІаҜҚ ,а®№аҜҮ а®•аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®ІаҜҚ 
а®№аҜҮ а®Ёа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•а®ІаҜҚ ,а®№аҜҮ а®•аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®ІаҜҚ

а®ҡа®Әа®ҫ а®ҹаҜҮа®ҜаҜҚ ....
а®өа®Ҝа®ҡа®ҫа®•аҜҒа®ӨаҜҒ  а®ҹа®ҫ...
а®…а®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝа®ҜаҜӢ вҖҰ
а®…а®ҹа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®®а®ҫа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҖа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іа®ҫ а®ҹа®ҫ вҖҰ

а®ҹаҜҮа®ҜаҜҚ..
а®№аҜҮ а®Ҡа®°а®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®°аҜҠа®®аҜҚа®Ә а®ӘаҜҶа®°аҜҒ 
а®®аҜӮа®һаҜҚа®ҡ а®үа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҒ ,
а®ӘаҜӮа®°а®ҫа®©аҜҚ а®үа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ а®Үа®°аҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜӢа®®аҜҚ 


а®®аҜҠа®°а®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ а®ӘаҜҖа®ёаҜҒ вҖҰа®Һа®ІаҜҚа®Іа®ҫа®®аҜҚ вҖҰ.
а®үа®°аҜҒа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ а®•а®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲа®Ҝа®ҫа®ІвҖҰ
а®ӘаҜҠа®°а®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝ вҖҰа®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝ вҖҰа®Һа®ҹаҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜӢа®®аҜҚ 
а®Ҡа®ҜаҜҚ ..а®ҡаҜҠа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫ а®®а®ҫа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®•а®ҝа®©аҜҒ 
а®ҡаҜӢа®Іа®ҝ а®Әа®ҫа®•аҜҚа®• вҖҰа®ӘаҜӢа®©а®ҫ 
а®ӨаҜҠа®•аҜҚа®• а®Ҷа®І вҖҰа®ӘаҜҒа®ҹа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜӢа®®аҜҚ 
а®ӘаҜҖа®ҹа®ҫ а®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®®аҜҮа®ұа®ҝ вҖҰа®өа®ҫа®Ҝ а®•аҜӢа®Ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҝа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ 
а®ҹа®ҫа®ҹа®ҫ а®•а®ҫа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝ вҖҰа®өа®°аҜҒа®өаҜӢа®®аҜҚ 

а®ҡа®®аҜҚа®Әа®өа®®аҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®өаҜҮа®ІаҜҲа®Ҝ а®Һа®ІаҜҚа®Іа®ҫа®®аҜҚ 
а®…а®һаҜҚа®ҡа®ҫа®ұаҜҒ а®өа®ҫа®°а®®аҜҚ а®’а®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝ а®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҒ вҖҰ.
а®өа®®аҜҚа®ӘаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®Ҝа®ҫа®°аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®өа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ІаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®•аҜӮа®ҹ вҖҰ
а®өа®іаҜҚа®іа®Іа®ҫа®°аҜҚ а®ӘаҜӢа®І а®өа®Ја®•аҜҚа®•а®®аҜҚ а®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҒ

а®ӨаҜӮа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝ а®ҡаҜҠа®ІаҜҚа®ІаҜҒвҖҰ.

а®өа®ҫ а®ҡаҜҒа®ІаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®©аҜҚ , а®өа®ҫ а®ҡаҜҒа®ІаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®©аҜҚ 
а®өа®ҫ а®ҡаҜҒа®ІаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®©аҜҚ ,а®өа®ҫ ...

snippet.title: The Battles : Sathisha Bhatt V Pavi Kalpani | Nagada Sang Dhol | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAвҖҷS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka

snippet.title: Kodiyil Oruvan - Official Trailer | Vijay Antony | Aathmika | Ananda Krishnan | Nivas K Prasanna
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of the Action Political Drama movie Kodiyil Oruvan. 

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

Credits:

Movie : Kodiyil Oruvan
Starring: Vijay Antony, Aathmika, Ramachandra Raju, Prabhakar & Others
Writer & Director: Ananda Krishnan
Producer: T.D. Rajha & D.R. Sanjay Kumar (Chendur Film International)
Co Producer: Kamal Bohra, Lalitha Dhananjayan, B. Pradeep, Pankaj Bohra, S. Vikram Kumar 
Music: Nivas K Prasanna
Cinematographer: N.S. Uthaya Kumar

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

snippet.title: Egypt releases drone footage of freed Ever Given
snippet.description:
Egypt's Suez Canal Authority released on Thursday (April 1) drone footage of the Ever Given ship, days after it was freed from blocking navigation in the key maritime passage for six days.
 
#News #Reuters #EverGiven #SuezCanal #Evergreen #Egypt

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

snippet.title: Suez Canal blocked after huge container ship wedged across it  - BBC News
snippet.description:
A giant container ship the length of four football pitches has become wedged across Egypt's Suez Canal, blocking one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Dozens of vessels are stuck, waiting for rescue boats to free the 400m-long (1,312ft) ship, which was knocked off course by strong winds.

Egypt has reopened the canal's older channel to divert some traffic until the grounded ship can move again.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Joe Biden trips three times while boarding Air Force One
snippet.description:
US President Joe Biden has been filmed stumbling over three times as he boards the Air Force One.

Biden was climbing up the stairs of the Presidential aircraft to depart for Atlanta when he stumbled over three times.

The US President then stood up, saluted and entered the plane.

#JoeBiden #AirForceOne

snippet.title: Teri Aadat | Siddharth Nigam | Anushka Sen | Abhi Dutt | New Hindi Song| Official Video| BLive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents new official video song Teri Aadat soulful vocal by ABHI DUTT featuring Siddharth Nigam and Anushka Sen. The lyrics are penned by Ishaan Khan and the music directed by Aishwarya Tripathi. Nitin Fcp & Nadeem Akhtar have directed the video. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.
